svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(26, 58, 92), rgb(167, 195, 224)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(13, 33, 55), rgb(196, 213, 232));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 220px; height: 1px; padding-top: 160px; margin-left: 5px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(244, 226, 194), rgb(56, 40, 13)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(154, 106, 20), rgb(180, 139, 65));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 230px; height: 1px; padding-top: 35px; margin-left: 585px;

div.div: Stressed — block new senior, raise dynamic fee

display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#33414D, #adb9c3); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); white-space: nowrap;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 277px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #52606D;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#52606D, #929eaa); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: INV-01: the junior/senior coverage floor is enforced at every senior deposit. Stress is a graduated scalar (slope, not cliff) that both defends the pool on-chain via fees and signals the Reactive layer to rebalance reserve.
